title: Vector Projection onto a Subspace
description: A visual explanation of projecting a vector onto a subspace using an orthogonal basis, showing the original vector, its projection, and the error vector.
elements: Subspace W spanned by u1, u2
relationships: v is decomposed into proj_W(v) (in W) and e (orthogonal to W)
proj_W(v) is the closest vector in W to v
e is perpendicular to all vectors in W
